message:
feat(installer): per-line color mapping for logo with blue-to-orange gradient

Replace the computed proportional gradient with explicit per-line case
statements mapping each line index to a specific ANSI 256 color:

- Lines 0-7 (PI AGENT block): cool blue gradient (159→63)
- Lines 8-10 (owl mascot): medium blue (69→75)
- Lines 11-16 (RUST block): warm red-to-orange gradient (160→214)

This gives the two text blocks distinct color identities (cool/warm)
with the mascot bridging them, rather than a single uniform gradient.

Also switch header info text from bold colored to subtle grey (252/248)
for attribution and description lines, keeping only the title and
version in bold color. This reduces visual noise below the logo.

Both gum and ANSI fallback paths updated with matching case tables.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
